label: Starting hediff
description: A hediff applied to a pawn at spawn time with a configurable severity, probability, and optional duration.

severity.label: Severity
severity.description: Severity applied when the hediff is added. Defaults to the hediff's initialSeverity when omitted.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0–1) that this hediff is applied during generation. Defaults to 1 when omitted.

durationTicksRange.label: Duration ticks range
durationTicksRange.description: Optional integer tick range for the hediff duration. When absent the hediff uses its own duration rules.
